name: MERLIN KNIGHTS
pitch: A Renaissance copperplate engraving sketch. The cursor causes paint to bleed through raw parchment paper fibers, gradually drying back to sepia when resting.

lifecycle.idle: Hand-engraved sepia cross-hatched sketch resting on raw warm parchment
lifecycle.discovery: Cursor enters, wetting the parchment paper and initiating capillary flow
lifecycle.buildUp: Original oil colors bleed along irregular paper fiber boundaries
lifecycle.peak: Max color wash is exposed with a wet watercolor staining boundary ring
lifecycle.recovery: Cursor departs, water stains dry out, and color retracts back into carbon sepia ink lines
